name: Synup vs ProManage.biz: Which One’s Built for Agencies?
hero_main_title: A Superior ProManage Alternative – Do More, Dive Deeper with Synup
hero_summary: ProManage.biz helps small Indian businesses go online. Synup is built for agencies who need to deliver listings, SEO, reviews, and social at scale, across brands, regions, and locations.

counter_text_2: 20% of businesses increased their online conversions year-over-year

section_2_heading: Why Growing Agencies Choose Synup Over ProManage.biz
section_2_summary: While ProManage is great for small businesses or solopreneurs, Synup has the capacity to grow with you. Synup offers a wide array of features designed to cater to various business types and sizes, from local brands to large QSR chains. Our expert team tailors your listings to serve your specific industry needs effectively. Here’s what Synup brings to your local marketing strategy:
section_2_slider_1_summary: Synup OS gives your agency a complete operating system with a central dashboard to manage hundreds of clients and locations. Use filters by vertical, region, or account manager, onboard clients in bulk, run Prospect Scans, track client health with churn risk signals, and manage the entire sales pipeline from one place.
section_2_slider_2_heading: Whitelabelling That Enhances Your Client Experience
section_2_slider_2_summary: Synup supports white-labeled dashboards, scheduled reporting, and branded portals, helping agencies deliver insights without revealing underlying tools.
section_2_step_3_summary: With Synup, agencies can manage everything from listings to local SEO and content publishing. Features like geo-grid visibility tracking, voice search optimization, and automated Google Posts are part of the core experience.
section_2_slider_4_summary: Synup enables you to customize review response workflows by location, sentiment, or brand voice. It connects with CRMs and POS systems to trigger review campaigns and supports centralized review monitoring across clients.
section_3_heading: How Synup and ProManage.biz Stack Up for Agencies
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE-BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Synup OS: Built For Agencies Looking To Grow
why_choose_tab_desc_1: Find new business opportunities with Prospect Search and run detailed Prospect Audits in just a few clicks. Show potential clients the exact gaps in their online presence and pitch solutions backed by data.
why_choose_tab_desc_2: Manage your agency pipeline, clients, and projects in one place. From onboarding to delivery, Synup OS helps you streamline tasks and run automated workflows across SEO, listings, reviews, and campaigns.
why_choose_tab_desc_3: Deliver listings, SEO, social, and reputation management at scale without switching between tools. Synup OS brings everything into one connected platform, saving your agency time and helping you grow faster.
why_choose_content_title: Synup: The Pinnacle of Digital Mastery
why_choose_content_summary: Transform Your Business with Synup – Beyond Comparison, Beyond Expectation.
testimonial_summary: Boost your online presence effortlessly with Synup's Local Listings Management. List, optimize, and monitor profiles on Google, Facebook, Yelp, and premium partner sites. Ensure consistency across search, local, voice, and social platforms. Access detailed analytics for informed decision-making. Take charge of your brand image by controlling displayed information. Synup: Where online success begins with seamless listing management.

seo.title: Looking for a ProManage Alternative? Synup offers a lot more
seo.description: Here’s why Synup is the leading alternative to ProManage for businesses seeking a robust local marketing platform that delivers impactful results.
